extraction.one_line_summary: DENNIS Rowan won the 9.5km prologue by 0.14 seconds over BODNAR, with GC favorites starting early to avoid forecast rain.
tactical_patterns: GC contenders deliberately started early in prologue to avoid forecast rain, accepting worse road conditions over weather risk.
THOMAS Geraint 17 seconds down in 13th signals minimal prologue prioritization compared to Dennis's rainbow jersey motivation.

rider_signals.DENNIS Rowan: positive: first win in rainbow stripes suggests psychological barrier broken after world championship title
rider_signals.BODNAR Matti: positive: third place only 1 second back shows Bora-Hansgrohe's prologue depth beyond Sagan
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: 17 seconds back in 13th indicates Tour de France preservation mode rather than Tour de Suisse GC commitment
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: neutral: seventh place in short prologue confirms points jersey focus over GC or stage hunting
